rows.label: qev025301_MSG0001
rows.name:
What's up? There aren't any
operational mechs here right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'm swamped thanks to a bunch of rookie
BLADEs completely wrecking them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0003
rows.name:
Most of these kids have no love for their Dolls.
They think it's like some anime where it gets
totaled and then magically fixed by the next day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0004
rows.name:
We're not alchemists here. If we don't
have the appropriate materials to
repair them, our hands are tied![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0005
rows.name:
You're a BLADE too, right? I figure
cleaning up your colleagues' messes
is part of your duty as a comrade.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0006
rows.name: Any interest in taking me up on a job?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0007
rows.name: It's nothing, just a simple task.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0008
rows.name:
Arnacian orewood... let's see, 40
pieces. That's all you need to gather.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0009
rows.name:
If you do, I won't say I can get it done
overnight, but I'll make sure to have
the repairs finished reasonably fast.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_JNK0010
rows.name: Clean Up

rows.label: qev025301_SEL0011
rows.name: Offer to go fetch the Arnacian orewood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev025301_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell him that a BLADE's work is their own responsibility.

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0010
rows.name: That's what I like to hear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0011
rows.name:
You're a good BLADE. I'm
sure you'll go far.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0012
rows.name:
What, you telling me you
don't have the time?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0013
rows.name:
Or is gathering 40 pieces of Arnacian
orewood too heavy a burden for you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0014
rows.name:
No, that can't be. For someone of your
caliber, 40 pieces of Arnacian orewood
shouldn't be an impossible number.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0015
rows.name:
Come on, I'm genuinely in a bind
here. If you didn't like the way
I asked, I apologize... Alright?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0016
rows.name: I'll leave it to you, then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0017
rows.name:
40 pieces of Arnacian orewood.
Once you gather them, just bring
them here. As for your reward...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0018
rows.name: Um, may I interject for a moment, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0019
rows.name:
Aganeba... What is it,
coming out of nowhere.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0020
rows.name:
When you say Doll repairs, you're talking
about the armor plating reinforcement on
that one brought in yesterday, aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0021
rows.name: Yeah, that's right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0022
rows.name:
If that's the case, 40 Arnacian orewoods
is incredibly inefficient, isn't it! Just
1 Noka mirrorstone is more than enough![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0023
rows.name:
This is exactly why you Earthlings
keep getting left behind by
technological progress, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0024
rows.name: What did you say, you little punk?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0025
rows.name:
Just 1 Noka mirrorstone, right! If you bring just
that to our Ma-non ship, I'll refine it into the
necessary materials in a flash, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0026
rows.name:
Prepare to be amazed by our
technological prowess, okay![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0027
rows.name: Hah... Now that sounds interesting![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0028
rows.name:
Alright. I'll just have to see this
technology that completes a repair with
just 1 Noka mirrorstone with my own eyes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0029
rows.name:
Once you find a Noka mirrorstone,
take it to the Ma-non ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0030
rows.name:
I'll just have to see this technology
that completes a repair with just 1
Noka mirrorstone with my own eyes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0031
rows.name: You're back...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0032
rows.name:
Oh! Looks like that punk Aganeba
showed up right on time, too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0033
rows.name:
Hello again, yes? I was worried about whether you
Earthlings could actually master using those
materials, so I came to check on you, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0034
rows.name:
...Well. I've got a few choice
words for this guy, but I'll
hold them back for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0035
rows.name:
So, are you going to hand over those
materials the Ma-non refined for us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0036
rows.name: I see... So this is it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0037
rows.name: ...No, wait. This is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0038
rows.name: What... you've got to be kidding me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0039
rows.name:
I get it! So that's the logic behind
it! Wow, I'm completely blown away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0040
rows.name:
Ah, sorry. I totally spaced
out for a second...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0041
rows.name:
But this material is incredible. It's
refined using a concept we Earthlings
would have never even thought of![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0042
rows.name:
With this, processing it is going
to be a breeze... We can expect an
even better finish than before![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0043
rows.name:
It's truly magnificent... Earth has
suffered a complete defeat here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0044
rows.name:
Of course, didn't I tell you?
You've learned your lesson, right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0045
rows.name:
Just as I thought, Ma-non technology is
the best in the universe, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0046
rows.name:
I'm begging you! Could you share the
refining method for this material with us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0047
rows.name:
If we just had this technology, our work
efficiency would improve drastically![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0048
rows.name:
Ehh... hmmm... I'm sorry, but I'll
have to pass on that, won't I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0049
rows.name: What, why?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0050
rows.name:
Because teaching it is a pain...
No, no, because it's a secret
Ma-non technique, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0051
rows.name:
I can't just teach it to
you so easily, can I![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0052
rows.name: So so sorry about that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0053
rows.name:
That little punk... Even when a guy
admits defeat and humbles himself...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0054
rows.name:
Hey. As a BLADE, you're used to
negotiating with aliens, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0055
rows.name:
Do you think you could persuade him to
teach us the refinement technology?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0056
rows.name:
I'm not asking him to do it for free, of
course. After negotiating, I intend to
pay the Ma-non a fair price in return.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0057
rows.name:
You've already come this far,
right? Could you do me this favor?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0058
rows.name:
Because the mountain of Dolls
that still need repairing
isn't getting any smaller.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0059
rows.name: We absolutely need that technology.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025301_MSG0060
rows.name:
Please. Get the refining method
for this material out of
Aganeba, whatever it takes.[ST:wait ]
